{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Indirial’s wife
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]]'s wife delivered a speech on behalf of the [[Overlord of Cana]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
